history.reason: Initial gate — AST scan found 19 bare-except/except-pass in api/core/kernel. Mix of intentional (QueueFull drop, tracer shutdown, psutil best-effort) and lazy swallows. Gate prevents new additions; fix existing ones incrementally.

known_legitimate: api/ws_hub.py:235 — asyncio.QueueFull: drop event for slow SSE consumers, intentional
core/llm_factory.py:766,777 — cost tracking is best-effort, noqa BLE001
policy: Ratchet this number downward as lazy swallows are fixed. Never increase. To suppress a specific legitimate pattern, add '# pragma: no-except-gate' on the except line and decrement max_count.
